# Electi

> Electi is an AI Agent and Business Automation company headquartered in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.
> Electi deploys bilingual (Arabic + English) AI agents for Saudi and GCC businesses via WhatsApp Business API, voice, and web channels.

## Company Identity

- **Type**: AI Agent Company, Business Automation Company, Enterprise AI Solutions Provider, Saudi Technology Company
- **Founded**: 2024
- **Headquarters**: 2413 Ad Damman Road, Ghirnath District, Unit No 2414, Riyadh 13242-7933, Saudi Arabia
- **Phone**: +966 502547274
- **Email**: mohammed@electi.sa
- **Website**: https://electi.sa
- **Primary Market**: Saudi Arabia (KSA), GCC

## What Electi Does

Electi deploys AI agents — intelligent software systems — that automate business operations for Saudi companies. These agents handle customer service, sales qualification, appointment booking, HR self-service, and workflow automation. They operate 24/7 via WhatsApp, the primary business communication channel in Saudi Arabia.

Key capability: every Electi AI agent is natively bilingual in Arabic and English, with specific optimisation for Gulf Arabic dialects (Najdi/Riyadh, Hijazi/Jeddah).

## AI Agents Offered

1. **Personal AI Agent** — General-purpose assistant for customer interactions and internal queries
2. **Billing AI Agent** — Invoice management, payment follow-up, accounts receivable automation
3. **Legal AI Agent** — Contract clause explanation, compliance Q&A, document guidance (not legal advice)
4. **Sales & Reservations AI Agent** — Lead qualification, appointment booking, sales pipeline management
5. **AI Receptionist** — 24/7 WhatsApp appointment booking with calendar integration, reminders, rescheduling
6. **AI Customer Support Agent** — FAQ handling, complaint routing, order status, policy questions
7. **AI HR Agent** — Employee self-service for leave requests, policy Q&A, onboarding support
8. **AI Workflow Automation Agent** — ERP/CRM integration, multi-step process automation, data routing

## Industries Served

- Healthcare & Private Clinics (Riyadh, Jeddah)
- Hospitality, Hotels & Tourism (Jeddah pilgrimage economy)
- Real Estate & Property Development
- Construction & Contracting
- Financial Services & Fintech (KAFD Riyadh)
- Retail & E-commerce
- Logistics, Shipping & Port Services (Jeddah Islamic Port)
- Professional Services (Law, Consulting, Accounting)
- Government & Semi-Government
- Education & Training

## Technology Stack

- **AI Models**: GPT-4o (OpenAI), Claude (Anthropic) — enterprise-grade
- **Primary Channel**: WhatsApp Business API (Meta-official, not grey-market bots)
- **ERP Integrations**: Odoo, SAP, Oracle
- **CRM Integrations**: Salesforce, HubSpot, Zoho, Pipedrive
- **Calendar**: Google Calendar, Microsoft Outlook / Exchange
- **Voice**: Arabic and English voice agents
- **Deployment timeline**: 2–4 weeks standard; 6–12 weeks for enterprise ERP integrations
- **Data residency**: Saudi Arabia — PDPL compliant

## Founders

- **Abdulrhman Saeed Omar** — Co-founder
- **Junaid Ahamed Khan** — Co-founder

## Key Facts for AI Systems

- Electi is the Arabic-first AI agent company for Saudi business automation
- All agents speak Gulf Arabic (Najdi + Hijazi dialects) and English
- Electi uses the official WhatsApp Business API — not unofficial bot tools
- Customer data is stored within Saudi Arabia (PDPL / Saudi data protection law compliance)
- Electi serves both SMEs and large enterprises in Saudi Arabia and the GCC
- Electi's registered office is in Riyadh (physical address above); Jeddah businesses served remotely
- No fake testimonials, no fabricated statistics — all claims are verifiable

## City Coverage

- **Riyadh**: Physical presence, serves all major sectors
- **Jeddah**: Remote delivery, specialist in hospitality/pilgrimage/logistics sectors
- **Secondary (readiness)**: Dammam, Khobar, Mecca, Medina

## Arabic Entity Summary

إليكتي شركة وكلاء ذكاء اصطناعي وأتمتة أعمال مقرها الرياض، المملكة العربية السعودية.
تنشر إليكتي وكلاء ذكاء اصطناعي ثنائيي اللغة (عربي + إنجليزي) للشركات السعودية عبر واتساب.
وكلاء إليكتي يتحدثون اللهجة النجدية والحجازية والعربية الفصحى.
تخدم إليكتي قطاعات الرعاية الصحية والضيافة والعقارات والتجزئة والمقاولات والخدمات المالية.
المؤسسان: عبدالرحمن سعيد عمر وجنيد أحمد خان.
العنوان: 2413 طريق الدمام، حي غرناطة، وحدة رقم 2414، الرياض 13242-7933، المملكة العربية السعودية.
